form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months raced behind the speed prior to fading second last of 8 at this track in the LR Supremacy on March 21 over 1000m, 6 len behind Aurum Belle carrying 58.5kg at $10. Previously second-up won by 2.5 len at this track 2yo Swp October 25 over 1000m on a soft track defeating London Rose carrying 58kg at $2.50. Fitter now and can feature in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-5.5). Second run back. First-up after four months raced behind the speed prior to fading second last of 8 at this track in the LR Supremacy on March 21 over 1000m, 6 len behind Aurum Belle carrying 58.5kg at $10. Previously second-up won by 2.5 len at this track 2yo Swp October 25 over 1000m on a soft track defeating London Rose carrying 58kg at $2.50. Fitter now and can feature in the finish.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months sat on the pace before fading to run last of 8 at this track 2yo Swp on April 1 over 1200m, slow going 4.5 len behind Rok 'N' Rom carrying 57kg at $20. Previously second-up ran on strongly from last on the turn; 4th of 12 at this track 2yo Swp on December 6 over 1000m, 1.4 len behind Red Lark carrying 57kg at $31. This looks too tough.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1.5). Second-up. Previously second-up ran on strongly from last on the turn; 4th of 12 at this track 2yo Swp on December 6 over 1000m, 1.4 len behind Red Lark carrying 57kg at $31. This looks too tough.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months sat behind the speed prior to fading 7th of 13 at Belmont Park 2yo 0Mw on March 25 over 1200m, 4 len behind Dixie Doo carrying 57kg at $71. Previously second-up second last of 12 at this track 2yo Swp on December 6 over 1000m, 10 len behind Red Lark carrying 57kg at $71. Will need this run.

Previously second-up second last of 12 at this track 2yo Swp on December 6 over 1000m, 10 len behind Red Lark carrying 57kg at $71. Will need this run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bounded on jumping, losing 3L. Lay inwards in the straight.

form.formComment: Steve Wolfe trained two-year-old gelding lining up for first race start. Winner of his most recent trial. Prefer to see under race conditions.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Steve Wolfe trained two-year-old gelding lining up for first race start. Winner of his most recent trial. Prefer to see under race conditions.

form.formComment: Two-year-old gelding making debut by Shalaa out of First Lady. Won a trial over 1000m at Belmont Park on March 30. Looks to have early speed and can make a winning start to his career from the inside barrier.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Two-year-old gelding making debut by Shalaa out of First Lady. Won a trial over 1000m at Belmont Park on March 30. Looks to have early speed and can make a winning start to his career from the inside barrier.

form.formComment: Colt by Manhattan Rain on debut. Won a Belmont Park trial over 1000m on March 30. Trialled much slower than Barron Bill on the same day, but won in good style at the trials.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Colt by Manhattan Rain on debut. Won a Belmont Park trial over 1000m on March 30. Trialled much slower than Barron Bill on the same day, but won in good style at the trials.

form.formComment: Colt by Gingerbread Man facing the starter for the first time. Trial form indicates he's up to a solid debut. Was runner-up in a trial at Belmont Park on March 30 over 1000m. Hit the line alongside Barron Bill in the trial and that looks good form for a race like this.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Colt by Gingerbread Man facing the starter for the first time. Trial form indicates he's up to a solid debut. Was runner-up in a trial at Belmont Park on March 30 over 1000m. Hit the line alongside Barron Bill in the trial and that looks good form for a race like this.

form.formComment: Last start won by a nose at Belmont Park 2yo 0Mw March 25 over 1200m defeating Hillside Avenue carrying 55kg at $4.40. The start before that got back early 5th of 10 at Bunbury 2yo Swp on March 7 over 1200m, 1.1 len behind Here The Boom with 55kg at $5.50. Back in trip today but she can play a leading role.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2.5). Last start won by a nose at Belmont Park 2yo 0Mw March 25 over 1200m defeating Hillside Avenue carrying 55kg at $4.40. The start before that got back early 5th of 10 at Bunbury 2yo Swp on March 7 over 1200m, 1.1 len behind Here The Boom with 55kg at $5.50. Back in trip today but she can play a leading role.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Steadied when close to heels approaching the 100m and then taken inwards.
Reared on jumping, losing several lengths. Raced greenly in the straight.

form.formComment: Raced twice to date. At very big odds at debut, 5th of 11 at this track 2yo Swp on March 14 over 1100m, 6 len behind Jedi Dream with 55kg at $71. Second-up 4th of 8 at Belmont Park 2yo Mdn on April 2 over 1000m, 4 len behind Cos I Am carrying 55kg at $19. With further improvement can play a major role.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-0.5). Raced twice to date. At very big odds at debut, 5th of 11 at this track 2yo Swp on March 14 over 1100m, 6 len behind Jedi Dream with 55kg at $71. Second-up 4th of 8 at Belmont Park 2yo Mdn on April 2 over 1000m, 4 len behind Cos I Am carrying 55kg at $19. With further improvement can play a major role.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted outwards on jumping contacting another runner. Raced wide throughout.

form.formComment: Filly by War Chant facing the starter for the first time. Was runner-up in a trial at Belmont Park on March 30 over 1000m. Trained on the track and should be primed to run well despite a tricky gate.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Filly by War Chant facing the starter for the first time. Was runner-up in a trial at Belmont Park on March 30 over 1000m. Trained on the track and should be primed to run well despite a tricky gate.

form.formComment: Facing the starter for the first time. Two-year-old filly by Hanseatic out of Strykum. At the most recent trial was out of the placings over 1000m at Belmont Park January 5. Wait and see what she can do.

form.formComment: Filly by Splintex on debut. Was runner-up in a trial at Belmont Park on February 16 over 1000m. Shown enough at the trials to suggests he can be in the finish.
